fields.title: agent: depth tracking uses wrong parent session ID
fields.description: Workers pass their original parent's session ID when spawning nested agents instead of their own ID. This causes depth tracking to always return 0 for nested spawns, making maxDepth ineffective. Fixed by updating agentContext.parentSessionId after session creation.
fields.close_reason: Fixed: agentContext.parentSessionId now updated to worker's own session.sessionId after session creation
